linkedin_metrics.note: Growing fast. Series compounds. Each post reaches more people than the last.

revenue_roadmap.note: Six revenue streams. Compass must remind Justin which lever to pull each day based on where ARR currently sits.

streams.name: Device Guide — School Subscription
streams.description: Age-unlocking device settings guide, science-backed, calendar reminders, AI-updated. Schools pay annually.
streams.lever: Every GUIDE comment is a warm school lead. GUIDE funnel feeds this.
streams.priority: PRIMARY — this is the path to £1M

streams.name: GUIDE Keyword Funnel → Demo Conversion
streams.description: Every person who drops GUIDE in LinkedIn comments enters an automated sequence: framework PDF → device guide → demo invitation
streams.pricing: Free to enter, converts to school subscription
streams.target: Each GUIDE lead worth £50–£200 in expected value
streams.lever: Diego posts drive GUIDE comments. More posts = more leads.
streams.priority: HIGH — automate the DM sequence immediately

streams.name: Substack Paid Tier
streams.description: £7/month for full research citations, advance posts, ChatGPT voice prompts, monthly evidence deep dive
streams.target: 1,000 paid = £84K ARR. Achievable in 3 months at current trajectory.
streams.status: Not launched — Diego writes companion newsletters, audience is building
streams.lever: Every Diego Substack companion builds the list. Launch paid tier at 500 free subscribers.
streams.priority: HIGH — fast path to significant ARR with zero marginal cost

streams.name: The Wrong Villain Policy Report
streams.description: Posts 1–10 compiled into a PDF policy briefing with full citations. One-time product.
streams.target: 10 LA sales = £50K. Credibility built by series already.
streams.status: Not created — Diego and Scout build the content, Herald pitches it
streams.lever: Herald should be pitching this to LA safeguarding teams now
streams.priority: MEDIUM — Herald-led, can move fast once series has 8-10 posts

streams.name: Speaking
streams.description: Conference keynote — BETT, Schools & Academies Show, NSPCC, PSHE Association
streams.target: 10 talks/year = £30K–£80K. Each talk drives new GUIDE funnel entries.
streams.status: Not booked — Herald should be pursuing this now
streams.lever: Wrong Villain series IS the keynote. β = 0.061 is the hook. 164 people argued — that's an audience.
streams.priority: MEDIUM — drives followers and credibility as much as direct revenue

streams.name: Agent Intelligence Subscription (B2B)
streams.description: Weekly intelligence briefings powered by Scout and the agent system. For EdTech founders, LA safeguarding teams, children's charities.
streams.status: Future — build once core product is at £300K ARR
streams.lever: The agent system itself becomes a product once proven

trajectory_forecast.now: Agent system running, series building, 7.8K followers
trajectory_forecast.6_months: 20K followers, 500 GUIDE leads captured, device guide in beta, first school contracts signed
trajectory_forecast.12_months: 50K followers, Substack paid tier live, £200K–£300K ARR, speaking circuit active
trajectory_forecast.24_months: Wrong Villain is cited evidence base in UK policy, £1M ARR within reach

compass_daily_mandate: Every morning: check ARR against the trajectory. Are we ahead or behind the 6-month forecast?
Identify which of the 6 revenue streams has the most momentum today and recommend ONE action on it
The GUIDE funnel is the master lever — more Diego posts = more GUIDE comments = more leads = more school conversions
Never let Justin do a revenue action that isn't tied to one of the 6 streams
When ARR is low: push stream 1 (school subscriptions) and stream 2 (GUIDE funnel automation)
When content is performing: push stream 3 (Substack paid tier launch) and stream 5 (speaking)
notes_to_self: The content series is the engine for ALL six revenue streams. Diego posts → GUIDE leads → school demos → ARR. Never let Justin treat content and revenue as separate activities. Every Wrong Villain post is a revenue pipeline event.
